Order To Show Cause Re: Dismissal
Off Calendar Apr-24-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Michael Wess, Esq. (510-444-7688) Of Bennet, Samuelson, Reynolds, Allard, Cowperthwaite & Gelini for Defendant/Moving party Sanjay & Vitel Patel.
Melanie O'Brien, Esq. (510-343-7997) of Kronenberg Law for Defendant Dhiren Gadariya.
Elisa Marcaletti, Esq. (415-278-9400) of Phillips Spallas & Angstadt for Defendant Dahlia Hotel and Vikas Patel.

The Court announces the tentative ruling, the Court did not receive any declaration, 2 years not done, outstanding discovery, technical problem re: tentatve ruling rule. ARGUED. Counsel for moving party Vijay Patel argues Plaintiff has not shown up for deposition , has not responded, miscommunication between Counsel for Defendants, declaration submitted around 3:30 pm. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Order to Show Cause Re: Dismissal is taken under submission. Moving party to submit a proposed order by 4pm today granting the motion. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported (D501)

Order To Show Cause Re: Dismissal
Off Calendar Apr-13-2017 Continued To Apr-21-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Elisa Marcaletti, Esq. (415-278-9400) of Phillips Spallas & Angstadt for Defendant Dahlia Hotel and Vikas Patel.
Melanie O'Brien, Esq. (510-343-7997) of Kroneneberg Law for Defendant Dhiren Gadariya.
Julie Batz, Esq. (510-444-7688)of Bennet, Samuelson, Reynolds...for Defendant Sanjay Patel and Vijay Patel.

The Court announces the Tentative Ruling. The Court will continue the matter since 2 years have not elapsed, no opposition, outstanding discovery. ARGUED. Defendant Dahlia Hotel argues compliance date of outstanding discovery is 4/19/17. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Order To Show Cause Re: Dismissal is tentatively Denied without Prejudice; the matter is continued to 4/21/17. Counsel to provide declaration under penalty of perjury by noon on 4/20/17. Counsel to give notice to parties. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)
